snippet.title: Pakistani charity offers medical aid & Oxygen to India amid crisis - Najam Bajwa
snippet.description:
India crisis: Pakistanis urge PM Imran Khan to send oxygen to Indian hospitals, Edhi Foundation writes to India’s PM Modi, offering to send ambulances and medical staff to help its neighbor fight the virus. Pakistan stands with India, Outpouring of empathy in Pakistan as India faces the worst of pandemic.
#PakistanStandWithIndia #OxygenShortage #PakistanAidIndia

snippet.title: POGARU (2021) NEW Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | Dhruva Sarja, Rashmika Mandanna, Kai Greene
snippet.description:

However, one incident that occurs in his childhood, changes his life forever. How exactly he overcomes that incident forms the rest of the story.

snippet.title: महाराष्ट्र के बीड में कोरोना का प्रकोप, एक साथ जलाई गई 22 चिता
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्र के बीड में कोरोना का प्रकोप, एक साथ जलाई गई 22 चिता

News State (न्यूज स्टेट) उत्तर भारत का सबसे विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. यहां पर क्षेत्र की सभी जरूरी खबरों को वरीयता से दर्शकों तक पहुंचाता है. यहां पर राज्य की राजनीति ही नहीं देशभर में क्या हो रहा है, इसके बारे में भी भरपूर खबरों का खजाना है. इसके अलावा क्राइम, बिजनेस, खेल और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें भी दर्शकों को परोसे जाते हैं. News State UP-UK खास तौर पर उत्तर प्रदेश और उत्तराखंड के लोगों की खबरों की जरूरतों का ध्यान रखता है.  वहीं, News State MP-CG विशेष रूप से मध्य प्रदेश और छत्तीसगढ़ के दर्शकों का ख्याल रखता है. सबसे निष्पक्ष, विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों को सबसे पहले पाने के लिए बने रहें हमारे साथ.

News State is a 24-hour Hindi news channel that caters in addition to National coverage, regional coverages too. We have regional channels like News State Uttar Pradesh/Uttarakhand and News State Madhya Pradesh/Chattisgarh. In terms of TRP News State UP/UK is number one channel in the northern India region. No other channel is in competition with our channel. It is because we give trustworthy and quick news. News State is a preferred channel by an audience which favors high quality programming and news.

Only Channel in the region that caters for the regional demand in such a way that it has become favourite channel of the audience.

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें: 
https://www.youtube.com/NewsStateTV
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें: 
https://www.facebook.com/NewsState/
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें: https://twitter.com/NewsStateHindi
News State Apps डाउनलोड करें: 
Download Android and iOS Apps for more updates: 
Android App: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.newsnation.newsstate
iOS App: 
https://apps.apple.com/in/app/news-state/id1224659680
अन्य वीडियो देखें : https://www.newsstate.com/videos

snippet.title: Radhe | Trailer | Salman Khan | Disha Patani | Randeep Hooda | Jackie Shroff | Prabhudeva | 13 May
snippet.description:
Yeh Eid, #Radhe Ke Saath
Countdown starts now!

#RadheTrailerOutNow

#SalmanKhan #JackieShroff #DishaPatani #RadeepHooda #PrabhuDeva #SKFFilms #ZeeStudios #SohailKhan #Atul #ReelLifeProduction #ZeeMusicCompany #ZeePlexOfficial #ZEE5

snippet.title: As India Gasps for Oxygen, We Ask: Could this Disaster Have Been Prevented? | Arfa Khanum | Covid19
snippet.description:
देश में कोविड-19 वैश्विक महामारी लगातार भयावह रूप लेती जा रही है. ये लगातार दूसरा दिन है, जब संक्रमण के तीन लाख से अधिक नए मामले सामने आए हैं और जो अब तक दर्ज सर्वाधिक संख्या है.

बीते एक दिन में रिकॉर्ड 332,730 लाख नए मामले सामने आने के बाद संक्रमण के कुल मामले बढ़कर 16,263,695 हो गए हैं. केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्रालय के शुक्रवार तक के आंकड़ों के मुताबिक 24 लाख से अधिक लोग अब भी संक्रमण की चपेट में हैं.

snippet.title: The Act At The Railway Station | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: India Covid crisis: Scramble for oxygen amid surge in coronavirus cases | ITV News
snippet.description:
The enormous scale of India's struggle with the world's worst coronavirus outbreak was laid bare on Saturday, as it recorded almost one million new cases in just three days. 

Hospitals are being overwhelmed by a monumental surge of seriously ill patients. 

Beds and vital equipment are in critically short supply and oxygen - the only hope for those in the advanced stages of the disease - is fast running out. 

Read more: https://bit.ly/3esPKg2

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world’s worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Coronavirus India update: सरकार पर फटने लगा है लोगों का ग़ुस्सा, Pakistan में भी बढ़ता ख़तरा
snippet.description:
पिछले 24 घंटे में कोरोना संक्रमण के साढ़े 3 लाख से ज़्यादा मामले. कई डॉक्टरों के मुताबिक़- अस्पताल में जगह ना मिलने से सड़कों पर हो रही है लोगों की मौत.बढ़ते संक्रमण के बीच मद्रास हाईकोर्ट की सख़्त टिप्पणी.कोरोना की दूसरी लहर के लिए चुनाव आयोग ज़िम्मेदार. चले हत्या का केस.

snippet.title: Covid: India faces 'disaster' as cases surge and hospitals suffer oxygen shortage | ITV News
snippet.description:
Health officials in India are urging people not to panic as the government insisted it's doing all it can to get oxygen to desperate Covid patients.

Supplies are being diverted from industrial use, as hospitals run out.

Once again the country recorded the highest ever number of new infections for a fifth day in a row.

One doctor warned India will become a "disaster zone" if cases continue to rise.

And a warning - this report from our Correspondent John Ray contains some upsetting images.

snippet.title: Kanpur COVID Condition: Hallet Hospital में Corona मृतक के परिवार का दावा डरा देगा | Covid-19 in UP
snippet.description:
#CoronaInUP #COVID19inUttarPradesh #CoronavirusInIndia #Covid19India #CoronaUpdate During the ground coverage of The Lallantop's Corona Zamini Hakikat, the team of The Lallantop visited Hallet Hospital in Kanpur to know the reality of arrangements and management done by the administration to overcome the Coronavirus pandemic in the city. 
While talking to the family members of corona patients, The Lallantop came across the wife of a deceased man who shared that her husband complained of being beaten by doctors while getting treatment for Covid-19. As of April 27, India's most populous state reported a total of over 11.2 lakh cases, including 33,551 in the last 24 hours. The total death toll has reached 11,414 according to official figures. The Opposition has accused the state government of under-reporting Covid-19 figures and trying to paint a rosy picture.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 12 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd Apr 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 12 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 11 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd Apr 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 11 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd Apr 21

Welcome to Har Pal Geo's hub for Pakistani content now serving the US! subscribe and hit the bell to become a part of our family https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

snippet.title: On Camera, Doctors Attacked After Covid Patient Dies At Delhi Hospital
snippet.description:
Doctors at a Delhi hospital were attacked Tuesday morning by the attendants of a woman, 67, who died in the emergency ward after her admission to the ICU was delayed due to a lack of beds. An unspecified number of doctors were injured in the clash outside Apollo Hospital in the national capital, which took place between 8 and 10 am. The police arrived an hour later - around 11 am. (Disclaimer: Content in this video could be disturbing for viewers.)

snippet.title: New Punjabi Movie 2021 | Tu Mera Ki Lagda | Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie | Goyal Music
snippet.description:
After success of "Kurmaiyan", Winner’s Film presents New Punjabi Movie 2021 Tu Mera Ki Lagda with Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Prince KJ Singh in lead & Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema as Spl. Enjoy this Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie. Other cast includes Nisha Bano, Jashjit Gosha, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh and Hit songs are sung by R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal. Film is Directed by Manjeet Tony & Gurmeet Saajan. 


Lead Cast: Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Gurpreet Bhangu, Prince KJ Singh, Nisha Bano, Chacha Bishna, Mintu jatt, Parveen Akhtar, Jashjit Gosha, Bhola Layalpuria, Satwant Kaur, Parm Sidhu, Roop Kaur Sandhu, Mini Mehar mital, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh

Special Apperance: Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema

Singers: R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal

Music Director: Atul Sharma, Laddi Gill, Ikwinder Singh, Dj Strings
 
Lyrics: Bachan Bedil, R Nait, Bittu Mehal Kalan, Harmanjeet, Amanpreet Bajwa, Vicky Dhaliwal 

Music Label: Goyal Music 

Original Background Score: Salil Amrute (U.K)

Assistant Editor: Garry Singh

Sound Design & Mixing: Sameer Shelar (Mumbai)

Di: Sanklan Media PVT. LTD

Colorist: Pushpendra Surywanshi 

Director Of Photography: Barinder Sidhu

Choreographer: Narsh Shikari

Art: Abhijit Singh (Attlai)

Asociate Director: Bikram Gill

Cheaf Ad: Gurmeet Photogenic

Ad: Gurbhej Singh, Subham Sharma, Angrej Mannan, Ladi Algon, Mangal Matta

Still: Studio Photogenic (KKP), Mangal Verma

Line Producer: Amarjit Khurana

Motion Grafix: Harprit Kang (FX Tantra)

Poster Design: Mika Singh

Dress:  Navdeep Agoria 

Visual Promotion:  Edit Point 

Promos: Raj Maan, Bakhshinder Singh 

Producer - Gurmeet Saajan

Associate Producer - Happy Goyal, Baghi Sandhu Rurka kalan (uk)

Co-Producer Satnam Batra, Gurmeet Singh, Bhola layalpuria

Written & Directed By - Manjeet Tony, Gurmeet Saajan

Synopsis of “Tu Mera Ki Lagda”

Manjot (Harjit Harman) and Sarbi (Shefali Sharma) meets in a marriage and they both started loving each other. The love affair reaches to marriage but the parents of Sarbi do not want to marry their daughter to a rich family. Because there elder daughter (Jaspreet Kaur) marry herself to a rich guy Harjot (Ravinder Grewal) on her own terms.

But the parents of Harjot did not accept their relationship. Parents of Sarbi don’t want to face again what they saw happening with their elder daughter.

Further, the story goes through its twisting turns to show, whether Manjot and Sarbi would be able to meet, would their families be united.

all these questions are answered in an entertaining way in the film “Tu Mera Ki Lagda”

#TMKL #TuMeraKiLagda

ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਫ਼ਿਲਮ "ਕੁੜਮਾਈਆਂ"
ਦੀ ਸਫਲਤਾ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ

ਵਿਨਰਜ਼  ਫਿਲਮ ਪ੍ਰੋਡਕਸ਼ਨ ਗੋਇਲ ਮਿਊਜ਼ਿਕ ਦੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਨਾਲ ਪੇਸ਼ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ
"ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਕੀ ਲਗਦਾ"

ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਹਰਜੀਤ ਹਰਮਨ, ਯੋਗਰਾਜ ਸਿੰਘ, ਸ਼ੀਫਾਲੀ ਸ਼ਰਮਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ, ਗੁਰਪ੍ਰੀਤ ਭੰਗੂ, ਪਿ੍ੰਸ ਕੇ ਜੇ ਸਿੰਘ, ਨਿਸ਼ਾ ਬਾਨੋ ਤੇ ਹੋਰ ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਸਿਨੇਮਾ ਦੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਅਦਾਕਾਰ

ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਰਵਿੰਦਰ ਗਰੇਵਾਲ, ਜਸਪਿੰਦਰ ਚੀਮਾ

ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ

ਸਹਿਯੋਗੀ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਹੈਪੀ ਗੋਇਲ, ਬਾਗ਼ੀ ਸੰਧੂ ਰੁੜਕਾ ਕਲਾਂ ( ਯੂਕੇ )

ਲੇਖਕ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਦੇਸ਼ਿਤ - ਮਨਜੀਤ ਟੋਨੀ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ


ਸਹਿ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਸਤਨਾਮ ਬੱਤਰਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਿੰਘ,ਭੋਲਾ ਲੈਲਪੁਰੀਅਾ.


#NewPunjabiMovie2021  #LetastPunjabiMovie2021 #PunjabiMovies

Film is Directed by Manjeet Tony & Gurmeet Saajan.

Synopsis of “Tu Mera Ki Lagda”

Manjot (Harjit Harman) and Sarbi (Shefali Sharma) meets in a marriage and they both started loving each other. The love affair reaches to marriage but the parents of Sarbi do not want to marry their daughter to a rich family. Because there elder daughter (Jaspreet Kaur) marry herself to a rich guy Harjot (Ravinder Grewal) on her own terms.

But the parents of Harjot did not accept their relationship. Parents of Sarbi don’t want to face again what they saw happening with their elder daughter.

Further, the story goes through its twisting turns to show, whether Manjot and Sarbi would be able to meet, would their families be united.

all these questions are answered in an entertaining way in the film “Tu Mera Ki Lagda”

#TMKL #TuMeraKiLagda

ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਫ਼ਿਲਮ "ਕੁੜਮਾਈਆਂ"
ਦੀ ਸਫਲਤਾ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ

ਵਿਨਰਜ਼  ਫਿਲਮ ਪ੍ਰੋਡਕਸ਼ਨ ਗੋਇਲ ਮਿਊਜ਼ਿਕ ਦੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਨਾਲ ਪੇਸ਼ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ
"ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਕੀ ਲਗਦਾ"

ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਹਰਜੀਤ ਹਰਮਨ, ਯੋਗਰਾਜ ਸਿੰਘ, ਸ਼ੀਫਾਲੀ ਸ਼ਰਮਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ, ਗੁਰਪ੍ਰੀਤ ਭੰਗੂ, ਪਿ੍ੰਸ ਕੇ ਜੇ ਸਿੰਘ, ਨਿਸ਼ਾ ਬਾਨੋ ਤੇ ਹੋਰ ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਸਿਨੇਮਾ ਦੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਅਦਾਕਾਰ

ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਰਵਿੰਦਰ ਗਰੇਵਾਲ, ਜਸਪਿੰਦਰ ਚੀਮਾ

ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ

ਸਹਿਯੋਗੀ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਹੈਪੀ ਗੋਇਲ, ਬਾਗ਼ੀ ਸੰਧੂ ਰੁੜਕਾ ਕਲਾਂ ( ਯੂਕੇ )

ਲੇਖਕ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਦੇਸ਼ਿਤ - ਮਨਜੀਤ ਟੋਨੀ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ


ਸਹਿ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਸਤਨਾਮ ਬੱਤਰਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਿੰਘ,ਭੋਲਾ ਲੈਲਪੁਰੀਅਾ.

snippet.title: इतना सब करने के बाद भी ये बेटियां अपनी मां को नहीं बचा पाई! |  MPTak
snippet.description:
उज्जैन के माधव नगर अस्पताल में मां की मौत के बाद उनकी बेटियां धरने पर बैठ गईं। दरअसल, इनकी मां को संक्रमित बताकर अस्पताल में भर्ती किया था। डॉक्टरों के कहने पर बेटियों ने मां के इलाज के लिए 6 रेमडेसिविर इंजेक्शन भी 1 लाख रुपए में खरीद कर दिए थे। लेकिन मां नहीं बच सकी। अब उनकी मौत के बाद अस्पताल ने महिला की रिपोर्ट कोरोना निगेटिव बताई है। इस पर महिला की तीनों बेटियां विरोध जताते हुए अस्पताल में ही धरने पर बैठ गईं।

snippet.title: COVID Surge | 'My Dad Died Desperately Awaiting Treatment': Ranchi Woman Lashes Out at Minister
snippet.description:
An inconsolable 30-year-old woman, on 13 April, confronted the Jharkhand's Health Minister after her COVID-infected father, who was awaiting medical help for about half an hour in the parking lot of a Ranchi hospital, breathed his last.

snippet.title: Coronavirus India Update : India में कोरोना के हालात पर Pakistan के PM Imran Khan क्या बोले?
snippet.description:
भारत में फैले कोरोना वायरस पर पाकिस्तानी प्रधानमंत्री इमरान ख़ान ने टिप्पणी की है. उन्होंने अपने देश को चेताया कि अगर वो ना संभले तो भारत जैसे हालात बन जाएंगे. इमरान ख़ान ने ईद तक कोरोना के नियमों का कड़ाई से पालन करने की गुज़ारिश की.

#CoronaVirus #CoronaIndia #Pakistan 

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 10 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 16th Apr 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 10 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 16th Apr 21

Welcome to Har Pal Geo's hub for Pakistani content now serving the US! subscribe and hit the bell to become a part of our family https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal
Momina Iqbal as Naheed

snippet.title: As India's COVID Crisis Mounts, So Has the Arrogance of Modi's Ministers | Arfa Khanum | Coronavirus
snippet.description:
#Covid19 #ManmohanSingh #HarshVardhan
कोविड-19 पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री मनमोहन सिंह ने प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी को पत्र लिखकर कहा कि हमें यह देखने में दिलचस्पी नहीं रखनी चाहिए कि कितने लोगों को टीका लग चुका है, बल्कि आबादी के कितने प्रतिशत का टीकाकरण हो चुका है, यह महत्वपूर्ण है. केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री हर्षवर्द्धन ने मनमोहन सिंह की आलोचना की है.

snippet.title: कोई हाथ नहीं या एक हाथ या दो हाथ से खाने का चैलेंज! क्रेजी फनी खाने के तरीके रटाटा द्वारा
snippet.description:
चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें RATATA Hindi: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCk9nbUmM7sXRIJyPyU9gyUQ?sub_confirmation=1
बड़ा , मद्धम या छोटा फूड चैलेंज: https://youtu.be/WUgaaLeLPfM


हम सारे दो हाथो से खाना खा सकते है सही?  पर क्या हो अगर आप इस काम को मुश्किल बना दे और अपने दोस्तों को बुलाये? और आप उनके साथ एक क्रेजी बैटल भी कर  सकते है! सो यहाँ पे तीन लोग है और  आप तीन लोगो के छह हाथ है  पर आप सिर्फ तीन हाथ इस्तेमाल कर सकते है ! क्या आप जानते है इसका मतलब क्या है? बिलकुल सही हम बात कर रहे है कोई  हाथ नहीं या एक हाथ या दो हाथ से खाने का चैलेंज का ! ये कितना मुश्किल है जब आप खुद ट्राई करंगे खुद जान जायँगे ! देखने के मजे ले ! हमारे  चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूले ताकि आप कोई भी वीडियो मिस न करे

snippet.title: COVID-19: भारत का 'Mission Oxygen' | Coronavirus | Latest Update | Air Force | Second Wave | Hindi
snippet.description:
COVID-19: India's 'Mission Oxygen'
The defence ministry said the Indian Air Force's C-17 and IL-76 heavy-lift aircraft have started airlifting big, empty oxygen tankers from their place of use to filling stations across the country to speed up the distribution of medical oxygen as India reels under the second wave of COVID-19 crisis.

COVID-19: भारत का 'मिशन Oxygen'
देश के कई हिस्सों में जारी ऑक्सीजन के संकट के बीच अब भारतीय वायुसेना ने मोर्चा संभाल लिया है. वायुसेना के विमान अलग-अलग हिस्सों में ऑक्सीजन के कंटेनर्स पहुंचा रहे हैं, ताकि सप्लाई के मिशन में तेजी लाने के साथ हालात संभाले जा सकें.

#COVID19 #Coronavirus #MissionOxygen

snippet.title: Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 82 Teaser - 14th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 82 Teaser - 14th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Har Pal Geo is now in the USA! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to continue enjoining your favorite Pakistani dramas

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad’s relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad’s life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad’s countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Agha Ali
Nimra Khan
Yashma Gill

Gul E Rana

Saleem Mairaj

snippet.title: Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 83 Teaser - 15th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 83 Teaser - 15th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Your favorite Pakistani content is now at your fingertips! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to become a part of the Geo family even in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad’s relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad’s life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad’s countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Agha Ali
Nimra Khan
Yashma Gill
Sajida Syed
Gul E Rana
Seemi Pasha
Saleem Mairaj
Rashid Farooqui
Shaharyar Ghazali

Mubasira Khanum

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: ROZA RAKHO || CONFIRM JANNATI FAME YASIR SOHARWARDI || NEW RAMZAN 2021 POEM FOR KIDS || TNA RECORDS
snippet.description:
Presenting you the New Ramzan 2021 Poem ROZA RAKHO (NO MUSIC) for Kids by Confirm Jannati Hai fame Yasir Soharwardi.

#TnaRecords #Ramzan2021 #RozaRakho

Lyrics:
شاعری:

Ramzan Aya
رمضاں آیا
Khushiyan Laya
خوشیاں لایا
Baat Meri Yeh Sun Lo
بات میری یہ سن لو
Roza Rakho Tu Aisy Rakho
روزہ رکھو تو ایسے رکھو
Allah Khush ho, Allah Khush ho
اللہ خوش ہو، اللہ خوش ہو

Ramzan hum py khas Khuda ki Rehmat hai
رمضاں ہم پہ خاص خدا کی رحمت ہے
Aman ka hai pegham yeh Mah e Rahat hai
امن کا ہے پیغام یہ ماہِ راحت ہے
Bachoun ki tarha tum sarkoun par rozy my larty ho
بچوں کی طرح تم سڑکوں پر روزے میں لڑتے ہو
Gali galoch bhi karty ho Aur ghussa bhi karty ho
گالی گلوچ بھی کرتے ہو اور غصہ بھی کرتے ہو
Aisa na karo, Aisa na karo
ایسا نہ کرو، ایسا نہ کرو
Roza Rakho Tu Aisy Rakho
روزہ رکھو تو ایسے رکھو
Allah Khush ho, Allah Khush ho
اللہ خوش ہو، اللہ خوش ہو

Yeh jo munafa khori hai kia jaiz hai
یہ جو منافع خوری ہے کیا جائز ہے
Quran ki ro sy tu yeh na jaiz hai
قرآن کی رو سے تو یہ ناجائز ہے
Phir yeh munafa khori kion ramzan my tum karty ho
پھر یہ منافع خوری کیوں رمضان میں تم کرتے ہو
Sasti chizain mehngy damoun logoun ko dety ho
سستی چیزیں مہنگے داموں لوگوں کو دیتے ہو
Aisa na karo, Aisa na karo
ایسا نہ کرو، ایسا نہ کرو
Roza Rakho Tu Aisy Rakho
روزہ رکھو تو ایسے رکھو
Allah Khush ho, Allah Khush ho
اللہ خوش ہو، اللہ خوش ہو

Badla hai andaz Zamana badla hai
بدلہ ہے انداز زمانہ بدلہ ہے
Dour naya aya hai purana badla hai
دور نیا آیا ہے پرانا بدلہ ہے
Allah sy ulfat ky jhoty daway tum karty ho
اللہ سے الفت کے جھوٹے دعوے تم کرتے ہو
TV ky agy tum sara din baithy rehty ho
ٹی وی کے آگے تم سارا دن بیٹھے رہتے ہو
Aisa na karo, Aisa na karo
ایسا نہ کرو، ایسا نہ کرو
Roza Rakho tu Aisy Rakho
روزہ رکھو تو ایسے رکھو
Allah Khush ho, Allah Khush ho
اللہ خوش ہو، اللہ خوش ہو

Digital Partner: *MobiTising*

snippet.title: Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
snippet.description:
Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
------------------------------------
Connect with HafizTahirQadri: 👉 http://bit.ly/HafizTahirQadri​
Record Label: *Hafiz Tahir Qadri * 
Credits:-
------------------------------------
Naatkhuwan : Hafiz Tahir Qadri, Hafiz Ahsan Qadri, Hanzal Qadri and Hamza Qadri
Audio: Rao Wassay (RWDS)
Composition :Hafiz Tahir Qadri 
Poet: Allama Nisar Ali Ujagar
DOP: Syed Bilal Sani 
Edit & Post: Taha Qadri
------------------------------------------------



Lyrics
======


Aya ALLAH ka mehman 
Aya he Maah e Ramzan 
Le kar hathon mei Quraan
Aya he maah e ramzan 

Rahmat e Ramzan Rahmat e Ramzan 
Rahmat e Ramzan
Rahmat e Ramzan

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he 

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga
Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga

Dekho flak pe chand chamka maah e ramzaa aya 
Nikhra nikhra har ek chehra maah e ramzaa aya

Pure maheenay roze rakhna acha lagta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Bacho roza rakhna he qurb khuda ka paana he 
Raazi hota he REHMAAN aya he maah e ramzan 

Ramzaa mei momin k muqaddar roshan lagte hein
Masjid k mehraab o mimbar roshan lagte hein

Masjid mei logon ka barhna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Ramzan k roze rakhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rab ki Rahmat ghar ghar utri aya he mehmaan 

mazy mazy ki khushbu pheli Saje hein dastar khuwan

Iftaari mei mil kar khana acha lgta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Gunbad e khazra k saye mei ham sab bethe houn
Dastar khuwan saja ho lab par un ki naatain houn 

Taiba mei Iftaari karna Acha lagta he he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Nafraton ko chor k tote dilon ko jour k maah e ramzaa ki barkat se ek banna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Rishwat lena or dena soud pe Business q karna maah e ramzaa ki barkat s bachte rehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Gheebat or chughal khori neiki se he ghaddari 
Maah e ramzaa ki barkat se sach hi kehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Ashra e rahmat ashra e bakhshish naar se azaadi 
Maang ujagar apni
bakhshish ban ja faryaadi 

Rab se duaen krte rehna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

"Rahmat e ramzaan"
------------------------------------------------
Official Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/HafizTahirQadri/


#MujhkoRamzanKaMahina​ #HafizTahirQadri​ #RamzanSpecialNasheed​ #Prophet​ #Quran​ #nasheed​ #ramadan2021​ #arabic​ #arabicnasheed​ #naat​ #naatcream​ #vocals​ #islamicnasheed​ #muslims​ #ramzan​ #ramzan2021​ #rehmateramzan​ #iftar​ #sehri​ #muslimworld

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3145 - 15th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3145: 
-----------------------
Tapu Sena is extremely happy and inform everyone that Popatlal's marriage is finally fixed and that Pooja is going to come to Gokuldham society later to meet everyone. Iyer informs that men of the society about Popatal's marriage and that news makes everyone happy. Popatlal arrives in the society inside an auto and proceeds to chat with Tapu Sena and Abdul. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Lyrics :

Paani di ki gal karde
Paani di ki gal karde tuhanu coke pila dange 
Sade nal dil la lavo tuhanu italy ghama dange
Shaadi tere nal karavangi 
Shaadi tere nal karavangi 
Jhadu pocha tusi la leyo
Chaa ape mein banavangi 


Taraan dil dia touch karde 
Taraan dil dia touch karde
Tuhade bina sada koi na
Daso kehdi gallon shak karde 
Tere kisse ve kamal hunde
Tere kisse ve kamal hunde
Hor daso ki boliye 
Tuhadi shirtan te vaal hunde 
Mere te yakeen tu kar lai shehad di pudiye ni 
Mithi mithi mainu lagdi zehar di pudiye ni 
Piche piche mere aave das ki chauna ae 
Ve tu mundeya chandi ve shaklo sona ae 


Tusi ehna sada nahio karde 
Tusi ehna sada nahio karde 
Assi jina tuhanu chahi jande aa
Tuhade nal ghum ghum ke
Tuhanu nazro bachai jane aa 
Ve tu kudiya te gaane gaune 
Ve tu kudiya te gaane gaune
Kade sade lai vi gaa sohneya 
Phone sada chak da hi nai
Kade milne te aa sohneya
Gadi vadi ji leyavange 
Gadi vadi ji leyavange 
Band baje nal sohneyo 
Tuhanu viah ke lai javange 
Gadi koi vi arrange kareo 
Gadi koi vi arrange kareo 
Kudiya de phone aunde ne
Pehla phone number change kareyo 
Teri mummy nu mana lavange 
Meri sasu maa bana lavange 
Oo mere daddy nu manau kon ve 
Oo tere vehle nal viahu kaun ve
Tere daddy nu mana lavange
Mere daddy nu manau kon ve

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/galat
♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/HmteEng78
♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/7v02B7tDzQHcPpgXHsZeEm
♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ6KvryY/
♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091HTH6ZZ
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/galat/1561142222?i=1561142475

Warka Hauli Hauli Karke Palat Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Oh Kise Hor Da Hona Chahunde Ne
Mainu Jhootha Pauna Chahunde Ne
Main Samjh Geyi han
Zindagi Cho Mainu Dhakka dena Chahunde Ne

Mere Nal Nal Eh Khali Khali
Falak Roo Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Main Waqt Kina Barbad Kara
Jad Bewafa Nu Yaad Kara
Main Paagal Ajj vi Har Kam Nu
Tera Naam Len Baad Kara

RAJ RAJ Main Yaad 
Teri Vich Khud Nu Kho Rahi
Main Ajj v Dardi Loka Ton
Barish Vich Roo Rahi

Dhokha Mere Nal Haye
Ab Talak Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Kabhi Kabhi Tere Dard Mein Haye Sharaab Bhi Piti Hoon
Maine Suna Main Tere Chehre Se Dikhayi Deti Hoon

Mera Jeena Mera Jeena Zeher Ho Gya Hai
Mera Dil Mujhse Rooth Gya Haye Gair Ho Gya Hai

Pal Pal Mereya Saaha Da
Haye Katal Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae
